# af config show emits the effective merged config, layering defaults
# with the user config under $HOME and any repo config in the cwd.

env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home/.config/af
cp user.toml $WORK/home/.config/af/config.toml

exec af config show
stdout 'schema_version = 1'
stdout 'default_agent = "claude"'
stdout 'worktree_root = "/tmp/owner/worktrees"'
stdout 'personal = "/tmp/owner/Vaults/personal"'

-- user.toml --
schema_version = 1

[general]
default_agent = "claude"
worktree_root = "/tmp/owner/worktrees"

[obsidian.vaults]
personal = "/tmp/owner/Vaults/personal"
